name: Apple Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Baking soda                         1 cup Sour milk or buttermilk
1 tsp Baking powder                       3 large Egg whites
1/2 tsp Ginger                            2 cups Apples, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder and soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix the applesauce, sugar and spices. Add milk, vanilla and egg whites. Mix well.
3. Stir in the flour mixture just until combined. Then stir in apples and raisins.
4. Pour batter into a sprayed 7x11-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
